pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 15: VERIFY_TOKEN="VERIFY_TOKEN_$(date +%s)" - dynamically generated at runtime, not static value

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Docker containerization exercise for a legacy cron-based ETL process. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/legacy-etl and the image is tagged as legacy-etl:latest. The task verifier uses dynamically generated environment variables for testing: the test token is generated as VERIFY_TOKEN_$(date +%s) at runtime (not the static value VERIFY_TOKEN_9988 claimed in metadata), and the test endpoint is http://verify.local (not http://verify-endpoint.local). All application data is synthetic, generated specifically for this task.
